description: Implement src/handlers/typescript.ts and src/tools/typescript.ts. Handler uses the TypeScript compiler API (typescript npm package) to run diagnostics. tsconfigPath is configurable via config (default tsconfig.json relative to projectRoot). get_file_diagnostics: validates file path through FilePathSchema, runs compiler on that file, returns array of {file, line, column, message, severity}. get_project_diagnostics: full project diagnostic pass via createProgram, returns {errorCount, warningCount, errors, warnings}. All file path inputs through FilePathSchema — no exceptions. Write tests using a temp directory with a valid tsconfig and a TypeScript file containing a known type error. Verify: error is detected correctly, path traversal is blocked by FilePathSchema, clean project returns zero errors. Note: typescript must be added as a devDependency (for the compiler API).
title: TypeScript diagnostics handler and tools — get_file_diagnostics, get_project_diagnostics

descriptionHistory.description: Adapt src/handlers/typescript.ts from Helix typescript-diagnostics/handlers.ts. Make tsconfigPath configurable via config (default tsconfig.json relative to projectRoot). get_file_diagnostics: uses TypeScript compiler API to get diagnostics for a single file, returns array of {file, line, column, message, severity}. get_project_diagnostics: runs full project diagnostic pass, returns {errorCount, warningCount, errors, warnings}. All file path inputs through FilePathSchema before passing to compiler. Implement src/tools/typescript.ts registering both tools. Write tests using a temp TypeScript project with a known error — verify the compiler correctly identifies the error, verify path traversal is blocked, verify clean project returns zero errors.

Implement src/handlers/typescript.ts and src/tools/typescript.ts. Handler uses the TypeScript compiler API (typescript npm package) to run diagnostics. tsconfigPath is configurable via config (default tsconfig.json relative to projectRoot). get_file_diagnostics: validates file path through FilePathSchema, runs compiler on that file, returns array of {file, line, column, message, severity}. get_project_diagnostics: full project diagnostic pass via createProgram, returns {errorCount, warningCount, errors, warnings}. All file path inputs through FilePathSchema — no exceptions. Write tests using a temp directory with a valid tsconfig and a TypeScript file containing a known type error. Verify: error is detected correctly, path traversal is blocked by FilePathSchema, clean project returns zero errors. Note: typescript must be added as a devDependency (for the compiler API).
